message:
test(fcp-core): pin UsageBudget{Policy,Limit,Usage,Snapshot} serde+display matrix (flywheel_connectors-g2up1)

Bead asks for RetentionPolicy variant Display + serde tag pinning. No type
literally named RetentionPolicy exists in fcp-core; the closest unpinned
<Foo>Policy-shaped surface is the UsageBudget cluster. EvictionPolicy,
FreshnessPolicy, BudgetEnforcement, ZoneTransportPolicy, and
DecisionReceiptPolicy are already pinned elsewhere.

Coverage: 2-field UsageBudgetPolicy JSON + CBOR shape, empty-budgets Vec
preserved in wire form (no skip_serializing_if), 3-field UsageBudgetLimit
shape with nested metric tag and u64 boundary values (0, u64::MAX),
7-field UsageBudgetUsage with nested BudgetStatus tag, 4-field
UsageBudgetSnapshot with budget-list order preservation through round-trip
and reverse-order distinct-serialization sentinel, distinct-axis
sentinels (metric, window_seconds, enforcement), cross-format consistency.

17 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-g2up1 cargo test -p
fcp-core --test retention_policy_variant_display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
